text.p: I am very glad of writing this letter to you. how are you and how is your family, work and also your condition over there .
If so fine glory be to Almighty God (eman).

The main mission of writing this letter to you is jus to tell you about the last national population and housing census in Nigeria. The national population and housing census is coming on 2/7/07 I am try to inform you about that as you know were doing before or last year so that is still keep on in did. So please try to response and come and enjoy the benefit of 1 character it. Although the is there is contribution between my family and your family also, so try as much as posible as your can. As you know that Government rule is very important to any of our citizen.
